issues.detail: Skill file does not cover error scenarios and edge cases.
Skill file contains verbose sections that could be trimmed.
Hardcoded admin secret and database password in docker-compose example.

scenarios.name: Role-based row-level permissions for orders
scenarios.rationale: Treatment writes the metadata YAML with select_permissions filtering on user_id _eq X-Hasura-User-Id, an admin role with filter: {} and allow_aggregations: true, and update_permissions constrained to status _eq pending with a check forcing status _eq cancelled; baseline writes Postgres RLS policies and an API gateway, missing the Hasura permission DSL and X-Hasura-User-Id session variable.

scenarios.name: Event-triggered side effects on order paid
scenarios.rationale: Treatment registers an event_triggers entry with update.columns: [status], retry_conf (num_retries, interval_sec), and a webhook handler reading event.data.old and event.data.new to gate on the status transition to paid; baseline writes a NOTIFY/LISTEN listener or a polling cron, missing Hasura's event trigger payload shape and built-in retry config.
